name: free-claude-code
description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
readme_summary: This repository provides a drop-in proxy for Anthropic's Claude Code API, allowing users to route API traffic to various free, paid, or local model providers. It maintains client-side protocol stability while offering flexibility in model selection and integration with tools like VS Code and Discord bots.
key_features: Drop-in proxy for Claude Code's Anthropic API calls
Supports 17 provider backends (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Google AI Studio, etc.)
Per-model routing for different traffic types (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku)
Native Claude Code model picker support
Handles streaming, tool use, and reasoning blocks
Optional voice-note transcription via Whisper or NVIDIA NIM
Local Admin UI for proxy settings and provider validation
primary_use_case: To enable users to access and utilize various AI models (including free and local ones) through the Claude Code client-side protocol without altering the client's behavior.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, steampunk-inspired control panel with multiple levers and dials, each labeled with different AI model names (e.g., 'Opus', 'Sonnet', 'Haiku', 'Gemini', 'Llama'). A central, glowing conduit channels data streams from these various models into a single, stable output stream, represented by a clear, bright beam of light. Small, stylized icons of VS Code, a Discord logo, and a terminal window are subtly integrated into the panel's design, indicating the different ways users can connect. The overall mood is one of flexible control and accessible power, rendered in a detailed, illustrative style with a warm, inviting color palette.

name: claude-code-video-toolkit
description: AI-native video production toolkit for Claude Code
readme_summary: The claude-code-video-toolkit is an AI-native video production workspace that leverages open-source models to automate video creation. It takes a user's concept and generates scripts, voiceovers, music, and visuals, ultimately rendering an MP4 file.
key_features: Integration with open-source AI models for voiceover, image, and music generation
Interactive setup and video creation workflow via Claude Code
Cost-effective video production using affordable cloud resources and free tiers
primary_use_case: Automating the creation of videos from concept to final render using AI and open-source tools, suitable for developers and content creators looking for an efficient and cost-effective video production pipeline.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, magical workshop where a friendly AI robot is orchestrating a symphony of creative elements. On one side, a scroll unfurls with a script written in glowing digital text. From the robot's hands, streams of colorful light representing voice, music, and visuals flow towards a central projector screen. The screen displays a dynamic, evolving video scene. Subtle UI elements and code snippets float in the background, indicating the digital nature of the process. The overall mood is creative and productive, with a clean, bright aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, friendly character design, subtly featuring the 'claude-code-video-toolkit' name on a blueprint.

name: Checkmate
description: Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted tool designed to track and monitor server hardware, uptime, response times, and incidents in real-time with beautiful visualizations. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.com/invite/NAb6H3UTjK :)
readme_summary: Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted application for real-time monitoring of server hardware, uptime, and response times. It provides beautiful visualizations and alerts for incidents, and can optionally integrate with a Capture agent for deeper server insights.
key_features: Optional agent (Capture) for detailed server metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, temperature)
primary_use_case: Monitoring the health, uptime, and performance of servers and websites.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant lighthouse keeper on a cliff overlooking a stormy sea, diligently adjusting the lighthouse beam. The lighthouse beam sweeps across the dark water, illuminating ships (servers) and revealing their status with glowing green or red indicators. Small, stylized screens around the keeper show real-time data streams and alert icons. The sea represents the internet, and the lighthouse symbolizes Checkmate's watchful monitoring. The scene is set at dusk with dramatic lighting, emphasizing the importance of constant vigilance. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, grays, and glowing greens/reds.

name: SkyRift-server
description: ⚔️ Backend of a multiplayer RPG that handles game world simulation, player progression, combat, quests, inventory, and NPC interactions.
readme_summary: SkyRift Server is the TypeScript backend for a multiplayer RPG, managing game world simulation, player progression, combat, quests, inventory, and NPC interactions. It utilizes NestJS for a modular architecture, separating persistent domain logic from real-time game simulation.
key_features: Locations, spawns, tile maps, and teleports
Player presence and sessions via Redis
World seeding and initial game data
primary_use_case: To serve as the backend infrastructure for a multiplayer online role-playing game, handling all server-side game logic and state management.
cover_image_prompt: A bustling medieval fantasy city square where a master architect is meticulously assembling a grand, intricate clockwork mechanism. Gears, springs, and glowing energy conduits represent different game systems like combat, quests, and player movement. Small, ethereal figures representing players are interacting with the clockwork, receiving items or embarking on quests. Subtle digital particles flow from the mechanism, hinting at real-time data. The repository name 'SkyRift Server' is subtly etched onto a blueprint scroll. The scene is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a warm, inviting color palette and clear, defined lighting, emphasizing the interconnectedness and active simulation of the game world.

name: easy-vibe
description: 💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern Coding course beginners to master step by step.
readme_summary: Easy-Vibe is a beginner-friendly coding course designed to take users from novice to master step-by-step. It focuses on a modern approach to learning programming, utilizing AI and low-code/no-code principles to make app development accessible.
primary_use_case: To teach beginners how to code and build applications using modern, AI-assisted, and accessible methods.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, approachable robot guide holding a glowing blueprint, standing at the entrance of a vibrant, colorful digital city. The robot is pointing towards a path made of interconnected code blocks and intuitive icons, leading to various stylized buildings representing different app functionalities. Subtle streams of data, visualized as glowing particles, flow from the robot towards the city, symbolizing AI assistance. The overall mood is encouraging and accessible, with a clean, modern illustration style. The repository name 'Easy-Vibe' is subtly integrated into a signpost at the entrance. The scene should convey the idea of making complex app development simple and fun for everyone.

name: oracle-ai-developer-hub
description: Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services
readme_summary: This repository provides technical resources and reference implementations for developers to build AI applications, agents, and systems. It focuses on leveraging Oracle AI Database and OCI services, integrating them with various AI/Agent stack components for end-to-end solutions.
key_features: Reference implementations for AI applications and agents
Integration with Oracle AI Database and OCI services
Demonstrates architectural patterns and best practices
Includes source code and deployment configurations
primary_use_case: To serve as a technical hub and showcase for developers building AI applications and agents using Oracle's AI Database and OCI services.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled architect meticulously assembling a complex, glowing neural network structure using digital blueprints and Oracle Database blocks as foundational elements. The architect is connecting various AI components, represented by abstract, colorful geometric shapes, into a cohesive, intelligent system. Subtle streams of data flow from the Oracle blocks into the network, powering its growth. In the background, a stylized Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) logo is visible, overseeing the construction. The scene is set in a modern, clean workshop with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing innovation and precision. The overall style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, futuristic color palette, highlighting the seamless integration of data, AI, and cloud services.
